query: UPDATE seo_projects SET campaignRunStatus = 'failed', campaignLastPhaseResult = '{"error":"SerpAPI quota exhausted - force advanced","timedOut":true}', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE campaignRunStatus = 'running' AND campaignPhase <= 2;
